feed.description: Long-form conversations about sustainability, systems thinking, and the ideas shaping our shared future.
feed.title: The Long View

bullets: Welcome back to The Long View. I'm joined by Skanda Amarnath, who reads the macroeconomy for a living. Skanda, good to have you.
You describe macro as risk management. Unpack that.
Macro is risk management at scale. The job is mostly not being on the wrong side of a regime change — and the regime change you can name in advance is the one you can position for. The rest is just…
summary.raw_text: Welcome back to The Long View. I'm joined by Skanda Amarnath, who reads the macroeconomy for a living. Skanda, good to have you.
summary.title: Macro as Risk Management
